name: bellink
description: Bellink — vertical-specific Claude plugins for small businesses. First wave: Polish real estate (Zboralscy Białystok).

plugins.name: zboralscy-social
plugins.description: Social-media operator for Zboralscy Białystok (Polish real estate). Brand-consistent listings, sprzedane announcements, market updates, and reels for Instagram + Facebook. Tier-aware (standard / luxury), Polish-grammar correct, Meta-publish ready.
